category_sources: source_facts.description says GNU grep, egrep and fgrep; GNU manual describes grep as printing lines matching patterns.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description identifies GNU grep; official GNU site and manual use GNU grep.
docs_sources: Official GNU grep manual pages on gnu.org.
repo_sources: Official GNU grep development page points to the Savannah Git repository for GNU grep source code.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names GNU grep; GNU manual covers command-line pattern matching and regular expressions.
